channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Robbie Williams has been open about his ‘90s struggles with …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Robbie Williams has been open about his ‘90s struggles with substance abuse, and the topic was explored in a Netflix docuseries.

Yesterday a video went viral showing a white substance falling from his face onto a mic during a World Cup interview.

Today the singer addressed the controversy.
item.content:encoded:
Robbie Williams has been open about his ‘90s struggles with substance abuse, and the topic was explored in a Netflix docuseries.

Yesterday a video went viral showing a white substance falling from his face onto a mic during a World Cup interview.

Today the singer addressed the controversy.

item.title: In high school, Susan Greenstein Prescott had a stutter and …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In high school, Susan Greenstein Prescott had a stutter and was embarrassed to speak in front of her class. Then her English teacher told her something that changed how she saw herself. n.pr/4fLwDP2
item.content:encoded: In high school, Susan Greenstein Prescott had a stutter and was embarrassed to speak in front of her class. Then her English teacher told her something that changed how she saw herself. n.pr/4fLwDP2

item.title: Woozy harmonies, otherworldly tunings, and notes that slip b…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Woozy harmonies, otherworldly tunings, and notes that slip between worlds. Explore microtonal jazz on Bandcamp.
item.content:encoded: Woozy harmonies, otherworldly tunings, and notes that slip between worlds. Explore microtonal jazz on Bandcamp.

item.title: Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control o…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control of rival Warner Bros. Discovery by the end of this week. Monday's temporary restraining order puts that plan on hold. n.pr/4pAeYNM
item.content:encoded: Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control of rival Warner Bros. Discovery by the end of this week. Monday's temporary restraining order puts that plan on hold. n.pr/4pAeYNM

item.title: Just in: Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly i…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control of rival Warner Bros. Discovery by the end of this week. Monday's temporary restraining order puts that plan on hold.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

Paramount's owners were hoping they'd be firmly in control of rival Warner Bros. Discovery by the end of this week. Monday's temporary restraining order puts that plan on hold.

item.title: Plus, Avalon Emerson & The Charm perform songs from the band…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Plus, Avalon Emerson & The Charm perform songs from the band's latest album, Written Into Changes. n.pr/4pyfegf

item.title: Greg Hetson has spent decades as a guitarist in two of South…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: Greg Hetson has spent decades as a guitarist in two of Southern California’s most influential punk bands, Circle Jerks and Bad Religion. But his relationship with vinyl started long before punk did, on record-shopping trips with his father. https://youtu.be/ve97vpts7Kc?si=Td1VnLxOQ6jw0s2T
item.content:encoded: Greg Hetson has spent decades as a guitarist in two of Southern California’s most influential punk bands, Circle Jerks and Bad Religion. But his relationship with vinyl started long before punk did, on record-shopping trips with his father. https://youtu.be/ve97vpts7Kc?si=Td1VnLxOQ6jw0s2T

item.title: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival hap…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.
item.content:encoded: We’re helping to get the word out about a great festival happening at the end of July. Get your tickets now for @soundwallfest.bsky.social featuring Ringo Deathstarr & more.

item.title: Gracie Abrams, one of today's biggest new singer-songwriters…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Gracie Abrams, one of today's biggest new singer-songwriters, has polarized critics with her confessional writing and A-list upbringing. Why do people care so much that she is taking up space? n.pr/3TvbXCd
item.content:encoded: Gracie Abrams, one of today's biggest new singer-songwriters, has polarized critics with her confessional writing and A-list upbringing. Why do people care so much that she is taking up space? n.pr/3TvbXCd

item.title: Home is at the heart of Hannah Laing’s global success. The …
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description:
Home is at the heart of Hannah Laing’s global success.

The proud Scot is using her international ascent as a platform to bring her people along with her.

Read the cover feature: mixmag.net/feature/hann...
Listen to the Cover Mix: mixmag.net/feature/hann...
item.content:encoded:
Home is at the heart of Hannah Laing’s global success.

The proud Scot is using her international ascent as a platform to bring her people along with her.

Read the cover feature: mixmag.net/feature/hann...
Listen to the Cover Mix: mixmag.net/feature/hann...

item.title: They call themselves the "cockroaches" and they're on the ma…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: They call themselves the "cockroaches" and they're on the march — demanding action against corruption, amid a shortage of opportunities for young people in India. n.pr/4pwlepH
item.content:encoded: They call themselves the "cockroaches" and they're on the march — demanding action against corruption, amid a shortage of opportunities for young people in India. n.pr/4pwlepH

item.title: With no guitar and a deliberately limited setup, Debt Rag tu…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: With no guitar and a deliberately limited setup, Debt Rag turn punk’s constraints into something strange, playful, and limitless.
item.content:encoded: With no guitar and a deliberately limited setup, Debt Rag turn punk’s constraints into something strange, playful, and limitless.

item.title: The crowd at the first show on June 4 was smaller, but it in…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The crowd at the first show on June 4 was smaller, but it included some of the same figures, along with Morrissey (the Smiths), Mick Hucknall (Simply Red), and Steve Diggle (who would later join the Buzzcocks). The story of these influential gigs was told in David Nolan’s book ‘I Swear I Was There.’
item.content:encoded: The crowd at the first show on June 4 was smaller, but it included some of the same figures, along with Morrissey (the Smiths), Mick Hucknall (Simply Red), and Steve Diggle (who would later join the Buzzcocks). The story of these influential gigs was told in David Nolan’s book ‘I Swear I Was There.’

item.title: In the audience were fans who became inspired to shape the U…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: In the audience were fans who became inspired to shape the UK’s post-punk and indie scenes: Ian Curtis, Peter Hook, and Bernard Sumner (who would go on to form Joy Division and later New Order), Mark E. Smith (the Fall), Alan McGee (Creation Records), and Tony Wilson (Factory Records).
item.content:encoded: In the audience were fans who became inspired to shape the UK’s post-punk and indie scenes: Ian Curtis, Peter Hook, and Bernard Sumner (who would go on to form Joy Division and later New Order), Mark E. Smith (the Fall), Alan McGee (Creation Records), and Tony Wilson (Factory Records).

item.title: One of punk’s most significant events took place 50 years ag…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: One of punk’s most significant events took place 50 years ago today when the Buzzcocks played for the first time and the Sex Pistols debuted “Anarchy In The U.K.” It was the second of two legendary gigs at Manchester’s Lesser Free Trade Hall, organized by Buzzcocks’ Howard Devoto and Pete Shelley.
item.content:encoded: One of punk’s most significant events took place 50 years ago today when the Buzzcocks played for the first time and the Sex Pistols debuted “Anarchy In The U.K.” It was the second of two legendary gigs at Manchester’s Lesser Free Trade Hall, organized by Buzzcocks’ Howard Devoto and Pete Shelley.

item.title: The visit by North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son Hui come…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The visit by North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son Hui comes without an obvious occasion, such as a multilateral diplomatic event or state anniversary, and has raised speculation that she may be coordinating a possible visit to Russia by North Korean leader Kim Jong Un. n.pr/4pqxfNa
item.content:encoded: The visit by North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son Hui comes without an obvious occasion, such as a multilateral diplomatic event or state anniversary, and has raised speculation that she may be coordinating a possible visit to Russia by North Korean leader Kim Jong Un. n.pr/4pqxfNa

item.title: Three U.S. service members have been killed since Friday ami…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Three U.S. service members have been killed since Friday amid rising tension between the U.S. and Iran. And, Hunter Biden talks to NPR's Newsmakers about addiction and public scrutiny. n.pr/4wdYPji
item.content:encoded: Three U.S. service members have been killed since Friday amid rising tension between the U.S. and Iran. And, Hunter Biden talks to NPR's Newsmakers about addiction and public scrutiny. n.pr/4wdYPji

item.title: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of the 2,344 cases confirmed as of Saturday. Thirty-seven new deaths were recorded in the previous 24 hours in one of the highest totals. n.pr/4aYrznN
item.content:encoded: Congo's health ministry said the deaths were recorded out of the 2,344 cases confirmed as of Saturday. Thirty-seven new deaths were recorded in the previous 24 hours in one of the highest totals. n.pr/4aYrznN

item.title: GANG PARADEメンバー11人、イギリス・ロンドンで全員DJになることに https://natalie.mu/…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
GANG PARADEメンバー11人、イギリス・ロンドンで全員DJになることに
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681618?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#ギャンパレ
item.content:encoded:
GANG PARADEメンバー11人、イギリス・ロンドンで全員DJになることに

item.title: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy Burnham is replacing Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Both are from the center-left Labour Party. n.pr/4fkQ2ov
item.content:encoded: In a transition of power presided over by King Charles, Andy Burnham is replacing Keir Starmer as the United Kingdom's prime minister. Both are from the center-left Labour Party. n.pr/4fkQ2ov

item.title: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing since peace talks between the two countries collapsed in dispute over a memorandum of understanding focused on the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4priHgk
item.content:encoded: The U.S. attacks were the ninth consecutive day of bombing since peace talks between the two countries collapsed in dispute over a memorandum of understanding focused on the Strait of Hormuz. n.pr/4priHgk
